description_long: This is a modern, single-family bungalow surrounded by a white fence and featuring a lush, landscaped yard. The house has a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large windows and a mix of single and double-story sections. The front includes a driveway with a parked car, a small porch area, and several trees and shrubs. The backyard boasts a rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, a patio dining set, and a mix of palm and flowering trees. The exterior is predominantly white with gray roofing and paved walkways. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood with ample outdoor living space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a white exterior, landscaped yard, pool, and driveway, enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, main entrance, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, fenced yard, and multiple trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the backyard pool, patio furniture, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the pool, patio dining area, and large windows facing the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
